query:
SELECT 
  c.id as client_id,
  c.name as client_name,
  c.whatsappPhone,
  c.email,
  c.userId,
  u.email as user_email,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointments WHERE clientId = c.id) as appointment_count
FROM clients c
LEFT JOIN users u ON c.userId = u.id
WHERE c.email LIKE '%alvarorios79%' OR c.email LIKE '%alvaro%'
ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
